gates.name: quality_recall
gates.description: Challenger must catch at least 90% of injected quality faults

gates.name: quality_precision
gates.description: At least 80% of flagged rows must be actual faults

gates.name: quality_fpr
gates.description: False positive rate on clean quality data

gates.name: challenger_beats_baseline_quality
gates.description: Challenger recall must meet or exceed baseline recall

gates.name: sudden_drift_sensitivity
gates.description: Detection rate on abrupt distribution shifts

gates.name: gradual_drift_sensitivity
gates.description: Detection rate on slow distribution drift

gates.name: drift_fpr
gates.description: False positive rate on stable drift data

gates.name: new_category_sensitivity
gates.description: Detection rate when new categories appear in a column

gates.name: challenger_beats_baseline_drift
gates.description: Challenger combined drift score must meet or exceed baseline
